{{Infobox artifact
| name = Hollow King’s Crown
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Hollow King]]’s Crown is a [[Forger technique]] associated with the [[Path of the Hollow King]], which focuses on the principle of [[Emptiness]] and the use of [[pure madra]] to dilute other properties. This technique manifests as a collection of blue-white stars that hang in the air above the user's head. As the technique is [[Forged]], more stars are added to the crown; once completed, it serves as a potent weapon against powerful entities such as [[Sages]]. [[The crown]] is linked to other techniques of the same path, including the [[Hollow King’s Mantle]] and the [[Hollow King]]’s [[Spear]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Hollow King’s Crown]] is a weapon [[Eithan]] is attempting to complete.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Hollow King’s Crown]] is a weapon.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Hollow King]]�s Crown contains a star that hangs in the air like a blue-white jewel.}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Hollow King’s Crown]] is a [[Forger technique]] that produces shimmering black stars.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The stars from the [[Hollow King’s Crown]] were used by [[Eithan]] to defend against lightning.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Hollow King's Crown]] dissipated harmlessly before striking the ground.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
